name: Apisync
absorption_note: BLOCK A app (Apisync) — Rust. Per ADR-023 app-policy: BLOCK A apps are self-repod. Apisync is one of 6 BLOCK A apps (Apisync/DataKit/phenoData/Stashly/Conft/Tracely). Stashly already absorbed; Tracely archived; Conft absorbed (batch3). Target: phenotype-apps/apps/apisync/.
note: Audited 2026-07-17; BLOCK A app fits the apps monorepo policy per ADR-023.
